title: EVA 05mechanical or biomechanical
wikitext:
[]: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by Assasinate » Tue Oct 12, 2010 1:00 am when i watched 2.0... i noticed to this unit that it has so many TUBES in its cockpit area... and the pilot's gear is quite OLD SCHOOL (using helmet that what Shinji and others used to) and if you look at it.... its much like its the 1st evangelion than the other.... ( due to its mechanical attributes) but much better than Jet -Alone unit

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by Sachi » Tue Oct 12, 2010 1:15 am Assasinate wrote: when i watched 2.0... i noticed to this unit that it has so many TUBES in its cockpit area... and the pilot's gear is quite OLD SCHOOL (using helmet that what Shinji and others used to) and if you look at it.... its much like its the 1st evangelion than the other.... ( due to its mechanical attributes)

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Tue Oct 12, 2010 2:16 am It's just an evangelion with mechanical legs and arms.

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by Assasinate » Tue Oct 12, 2010 7:02 am Sachi wrote: Wait, what? This made absolutely no sense to me. The only time Shinji ever wears a helmet is during Operation Yashima, and the helmet was to only help with his aiming. So, if you look at Unit-05 ... it's much like all the Evangelions, except completely not due to the mechanical lower half. I'm not sure what point you're trying to make or clarify, but there's probably a thread about Unit-05 somewhere in here.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 12, 2010 8:14 am It definitely does come off as being considerably more mechanical than the other Evas. But there also doesn't appear to be anything to explicitly say one way or another whether it is funny mechanical, however I would assume it is bio-mechanical as that's more or less a requisite for being an Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Tue Oct 12, 2010 9:42 am But aren´t Evas supposed to be of humanoid shape?

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 12, 2010 10:13 am InstrumentalityOne wrote: But aren´t Evas supposed to be of humanoid shape?

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Oct 12, 2010 10:31 am It's basically an Eva that's had all of it's limbs amputated and replaced with cyborg parts.

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by jojojoker » Tue Oct 12, 2010 10:45 am Assasinate wrote: this unit quite unlike others that they can fight in any background...EVA-05 seems can only fight within underground tunnels, and it also has no AT-FIELD at all (there's a scene where the angel its engaged just passed thru by passing above it)

[]:             Quote Post by Marduk » Tue Oct 12, 2010 11:55 am Eva-05 is the MP-Eva that gets its legs chopped off... *stabbed, shot, and hung to rot where everyone can see*

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Tue Oct 12, 2010 3:13 pm It's biomechanical, else it wouldn't be an Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Tue Oct 12, 2010 8:28 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: It's still recognizably humanoid. I'm going to start referring to Unit-05 as the "Armored Core" Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Tue Oct 12, 2010 8:42 pm AuraTwilight wrote: It's biomechanical, else it wouldn't be an Evangelion.

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by Assasinate » Tue Oct 12, 2010 11:00 pm jojojoker wrote: well presumably it was constructed to protect the Acheron(?) base which is primarily tunnels which would be too small to fit the conventional EVA. I think its design was to correspond with its designated location. Also it was deemed a provisional type EVA so perhaps nerv or ipea decided to experiment with failed EVA which couldn't grow legs in its development stage. Thus it's kind of salvaging the top half and compromising with mechanical legs. .

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Wed Oct 13, 2010 5:40 am Assasinate wrote: also the positron gun is quite powerful despite that it has a very BIG FEEDBACK ( eating almost the whole nation's ELECTRICITY by using it...)

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by Zoop » Wed Oct 13, 2010 6:23 am Assasinate wrote: all of their mechanical stuff are such a BIG FAILURE againts the angels...but i think thru the effort of this model by just doing an EMO stuff (suicide) well a little bit of success.. againts an nameless angel thats only barely in BONES...

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by Assasinate » Wed Oct 13, 2010 7:54 am KnightmareX13 wrote: Exactly what does a postitron gun have to do with Eva unit 05? 05 never used one.

[]: Re: EVA-05...mechanical or biomechanical??             Quote Post by jojojoker » Wed Oct 13, 2010 8:17 am Assasinate wrote: ow by the way... is this unit-05 only have one weapon??? i noticed that it's only weapon is its spear on the left arm??(despite that its just only have some mechanical arms unlike to other EVA's)

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Wed Oct 13, 2010 9:21 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I'm going to start referring to Unit-05 as the "Armored Core" Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Wed Oct 13, 2010 3:51 pm Dean Kamen FTW.
